untranslatable_reason: Pattern recognition requires multi-bar peak detection and morphological analysis (Eve vs Adam peak shape distinction, width comparison, inverted V detection, confirmation line calculation). These require custom pattern matching logic not available in the allowed indicator set. Specifically: (1) Identifying two distinct peaks with different shapes/widths, (2) Confirming the left peak (Eve) is wider/rounded vs right peak (Adam) is narrow/inverted-V, (3) Computing a dynamic confirmation line. Only basic volume and price proxies could be substituted, which would not capture the true signal intent.
translation_notes: Signal describes a sophisticated chart pattern (Double Top Eve & Adam) with qualitative morphological characteristics. While entry_short uses a placeholder condition (close below pivot with volume confirmation) as a proxy for 'price closes below confirmation line', this does not capture the pattern's core logic: two morphologically distinct peaks after an uptrend. A proper implementation would require custom pattern detection functions. The 72% success rate and 19% average decline suggest a mean reversion structure with ~20-day typical hold and 2-5% stop loss.
